headlines.title: Trump warns a 'whole civilization will die tonight' if a deal with Iran isn't reached
Pakistan asks for 2-week ceasefire amid diplomatic efforts
Stocks swing from losses to a tiny gain ahead of Trump's deadline for Iran
US 10-Year Treasury Yield Rises for Second Session to Around 4.35%
Brent Crude eases to $109.27 but remains volatile due to Kharg Island strikes

notes: Market values and headlines are compiled based on the latest available updates on 2026-04-07.
Major US indexes rallied slightly at the end of the session on hopes for a Pakistan-brokered ceasefire.
Markets are closely monitoring President Trump's deadline for Iran regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
